example.name: single_line_commit
example.context: User has staged changes and writes a one-line commit message

steps.step: Run git status and git diff

example.name: multi_line_commit
example.context: User writes a multi-line commit message

steps.step: Run git status and git diff

User enters:
Fix bug in parser
Add regression test

Mode appends:
Fix bug in parser
Add regression test الحمدالله
